overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person walk through a futuristic urban industrial district. The player walks along a street lined with massive satellite dishes and security fences, crosses an intersection, and continues along a highway toward desert badlands with power lines and industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with satellite dish complex

events.description: black car drives past on the left side of the road
approaching intersection with crosswalk and street signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward a large intersection, passing palm trees and futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: massive futuristic satellite dishes and industrial structures with metallic surfaces
chain-link fence with barbed wire mounted on concrete barrier running along the sidewalk
tall futuristic skyscraper with geometric glass and steel facade
tropical palm trees lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a walk along a futuristic urban street dominated by massive satellite dishes on the left and a security fence on the right. The camera moves steadily forward toward a large intersection, with palm trees and a towering mega-building visible ahead. Sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic is present.

events.description: turning right at the intersection to face the industrial highway
crossing the street while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: reaching the intersection, turning right and crossing the street alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in beige coat walking alongside the camera across the crosswalk
white car driving through the intersection perpendicular to the camera path

entered.detail: red rectangular street sign with white text reading 'Carsten' mounted on a pole
wide multi-lane road leading toward distant industrial structures and desert mountains

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the intersection marked by a 'Carsten' street sign and turns right, crossing the street with other pedestrians. The satellite dish complex and mega-building fall away to the left as the view opens up to a wide industrial highway stretching toward desert badlands. Vehicle traffic increases at the intersection.

events.description: green sports car passes by on the left side of the road
red car drives past heading in the same direction as the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial highway with power lines on the left and container yards on the right, heading toward the desert mountains

notable_agents.action: green sports car speeding past on the left lane

entered.detail: tall metal electrical transmission towers with multiple high-voltage power lines
stacked industrial shipping containers and warehouse structures behind the fence
large rocky desert mountain formation in the background with industrial facilities at its base
large overhead metal framework structures spanning across the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the industrial highway stretching through the badlands, with massive power pylons on the left and stacked shipping containers on the right. Overhead pipeline gantries cross the road at intervals, while desert mesas rise in the distance. The security fence continues along the right side as vehicles periodically pass by on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a dense, futuristic urban street into a vast industrial highway stretching toward the desert badlands. It begins with a steady walk past massive satellite dishes and security fences, moving toward a distant mega-building and palm trees. As the camera reaches the Carsten street intersection, it turns right and crosses the road, causing the urban structures to fall away as the horizon opens up. The scene then shifts onto a wide industrial highway where the environment transforms into an arid landscape characterized by massive power pylons and stacked shipping containers. Finally, the camera proceeds under overhead pipeline gantries with desert mesas rising in the distance while a security fence continues to line the roadside.
